variables.name: tube_material_mass
variables.label: Tube and material mass
variables.description: Caller-asserted supported tube and material mass.

variables.name: contained_liquid_volume
variables.label: Contained liquid volume
variables.description: Contained process-liquid volume; may bind the reviewed 047 total liquid inventory.

variables.name: contained_liquid_density
variables.label: Contained liquid density
variables.description: Density of the contained process liquid.

variables.name: attached_hardware_mass
variables.label: Attached hardware mass
variables.description: Explicitly included nodes, sensors, fittings, pump allocation, and other hardware mass.

variables.name: external_fluid_density
variables.label: External fluid density
variables.description: Density of the surrounding water used for static displacement screening.

variables.name: buoyancy_safety_factor
variables.label: Buoyancy screening safety factor
variables.description: Explicit screening multiplier applied to total supported wet mass; not a certification factor.

variables.name: inherent_displacement_volume
variables.label: Inherent sealed displacement volume
variables.description: Caller-asserted sealed or non-flooded displacement already supplied by the assembly.

variables.name: daily_fouling_loss_fraction
variables.label: Daily fouling loss fraction
variables.description: Dimensionless optical-loss fraction for one nominal day in the discrete screening relationship.

variables.name: cleaning_interval
variables.label: Cleaning interval
variables.description: Elapsed nominal days between clean-state restoration events in the screening proxy.

variables.name: culture_attenuation_coefficient
variables.label: Culture attenuation coefficient
variables.description: Dry-weight-specific Beer-Lambert-like attenuation coefficient to be measured.

variables.name: operating_biomass_concentration
variables.label: Operating biomass concentration
variables.description: Dry biomass concentration used only in the optical transmission proxy.

variables.name: optical_path_length
variables.label: Explicit optical path length
variables.description: Caller-selected attenuation path; never derived automatically from tube diameter.

variables.name: available_auxiliary_flotation_volume
variables.label: Available auxiliary flotation volume
variables.description: Optional candidate auxiliary displacement used only for margin and pass/fail comparison.
